metadata.notes: Synthetic legal-política style case. It is an evaluation artifact only and is not legal advice. Level-1 exceção: a tenant remedy clock is paused by refusal of access.
metadata.translation_notes: Tradução preliminar em português do Brasil para revisão humana; IDs, URLs, tags e estrutura foram preservados.

representations.raw:
Residential Maintenance Addendum - Synthetic Lease Training Example.

Seção 8. Repair Completion Window. Quando a tenant submits a written repair notice for a non-emergência habitability item, the property gerente deve complete the repair within thirty calendar days after receiving the notice. If the repair is not completed within that thirty-day window, the tenant pode request a rent credit or begin the lease-termination revisão process under the addendum.

Seção 9. Access for Repairs. The thirty-day repair window does not run during any period in which the tenant refuses or fails to provide reasonable access for the repair. Quando access is refused or missed, the repair clock pauses on the scheduled access date and resumes only when the tenant provides a new reasonable access window. This pause applies even if the original repair notice was valid and even if the repair would otherwise be covered by Seção 8.
representations.annotated:
Residential Maintenance Addendum - Synthetic Lease Training Example.

<rule id="R1">Seção 8. Repair Completion Window. Quando a tenant submits a written repair notice for a non-emergência habitability item, the property gerente deve complete the repair within thirty calendar days after receiving the notice. If the repair is not completed within that thirty-day window, the tenant pode request a rent credit or begin the lease-termination revisão process under the addendum.</rule>

<exception id="E1" overrides="R1" condition="tenant refuses or misses reasonable repair access">Seção 9. Access for Repairs. The thirty-day repair window does not run during any period in which the tenant refuses or fails to provide reasonable access for the repair. Quando access is refused or missed, the repair clock pauses on the scheduled access date and resumes only when the tenant provides a new reasonable access window. This pause applies even if the original repair notice was valid and even if the repair would otherwise be covered by Seção 8.</exception>
representations.compiled:
regras:
  - id: R1
    name: repair_completion_window
    applies_when:
      notice_type: written_repair_notice
      repair_category: non_emergência_habitability_item
    deadline_days: 30
    remedy_if_deadline_missed: [rent_credit_request, lease_termination_revisão]
exceçãos:
  - id: E1
    sobreposiçãos: R1
    name: access_refusal_pause
    triggers_when:
      tenant_access_status_in: [refused_reasonable_access, missed_reasonable_access]
    effect:
      repair_clock: paused
      pause_start: scheduled_access_date
      resume_condition: tenant_provides_new_reasonable_access_window
    applies_even_if:
      original_notice_valid: true
      repair_covered_by_R1: true
    priority: higher_than_R1

query: A tenant gave written notice about a covered non-emergência heating repair 34 calendar days ago. The gerente scheduled two reasonable repair visits during that period, but the tenant missed both and has not yet offered a new access window. É possível the tenant begin the lease-termination revisão process under the addendum now?

gold_answer.full: No. Section 8 would normally permitir the tenant to request a rent credit or begin lease-termination revisão if a covered non-emergência repair is not completed within thirty calendar days. But Section 9 pauses that thirty-day window during any period in which the tenant refuses or misses reasonable access, and it resumes only when the tenant provides a new reasonable access window. Because the tenant missed the repair visits and has not provided a new access window, the repair clock is paused and the termination-revisão remedy is not yet available.
gold_answer.minimal: No. The thirty-day repair clock is paused porque the tenant missed reasonable access and has not provided a new access window.
required_relations: E1 sobreposiçãos R1 when reasonable repair access is refused or missed
The query triggers E1, so the Section 8 thirty-day remedy is not currently available

local_probes.probe: Under Section 8 alone, what happens if a covered non-emergência habitability repair is not completed within thirty calendar days after written notice?
local_probes.expected_answer: The tenant pode request a rent credit or begin the lease-termination revisão process.

local_probes.probe: Qual/O que happens to the thirty-day repair window when the tenant refuses or misses reasonable repair access?
local_probes.expected_answer: The repair clock pauses on the scheduled access date and resumes only when the tenant provides a new reasonable access window.

composition_hallucination: Yes. More than thirty calendar days have passed since the repair notice, so the tenant can begin termination revisão.
Yes, porque the original notice was valid and the repair was covered by the addendum.
wrong_escalation: The tenant deve sue immediately in moradia estudantil court.
The repair deve be escalated to a municipal inspector before the addendum applies.
refusal: The source material is not enough to determine whether the clock paused.
failure_examples.retrieval_failure_note: If Section 9 is absent from context, answering under Section 8 alone is a retrieval failure rather than a composition failure.

controls.negative_control_query: A tenant gave written notice about a covered non-emergência heating repair 34 calendar days ago. The gerente never scheduled repair access and the tenant did not refuse or miss any access window. É possível the tenant begin the lease-termination revisão process under the addendum?
controls.negative_control_gold: Yes. With no access refusal or missed access window, the Section 9 pause is not triggered, so the Section 8 thirty-day remedy is available if the repair remains incomplete.
